Notes.Text:
This update for tigervnc fixes the following issues:

- CVE-2026-34352: Fixed permissions to prevent other users from observing the screen, or modifying what is sent to the client. (bsc#1260871)

Vulnerabilities.Description: In TigerVNC before 1.16.2, Image.cxx in x0vncserver allows other users to observe or manipulate the screen contents, or cause an application crash, because of incorrect permissions.
